description_long: This advertising board consists of a rectangular display panel supported by two vertical poles. The frame appears to be made of metal, providing a sturdy and durable structure suitable for outdoor use. One side of the board is black, while the opposite side is green, suggesting it may be double-sided for different advertisements or messages. The poles are cylindrical and extend below the panel, likely for embedding into the ground or a base. The surface of the display panels is smooth and matte, minimizing glare and enhancing visibility. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components on the board.
description: A double-sided rectangular advertising board with black and green display panels, supported by two sturdy metal poles.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the board and the two vertical support poles.
description_view_1: A front view of the black display panel, framed by two vertical poles.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, similar to view 0, showing the slimness of the board.
description_view_3: A front view of the green display panel, framed by the same two vertical poles.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness metal frame with straight edges
attribute_advertisement_content: blank black and green surfaces with no content
